package rulecoverage

func PositiveGormOpenPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_open_per_request"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "gorm.Open(...) called on request paths instead of process-level setup."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
